heading: Quarters: temporary; transient members
label: 8773 Quarters: temporary; transient members
text: Temporary quarters may be furnished on a rental basis to transient members of the naval service with their dependents, for periods not exceeding 60 days, without loss of entitlement to basic allowance for housing under .section 403 of title 37
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7573[None].(3d proviso on p. 190), .April 4, 1944, ch. 16558 Stat. 190The words “That effective ” are omitted as executed. The word “quarters” is substituted for the word “housing” for uniformity. The words “basic allowance for quarters” are substituted for the words “rental allowance or money allowance for quarters” to conform to the terminology of § 302 of the Career Compensation Act of 1949 ().December 13, 194337 U.S.C. 252

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7573 of this title1997— substituted “basic allowance for housing under ” for “basic allowance for quarters”.Pub. L. 105–85section 403 of title 37
